content.en:
Now.

The emperors on the side of the Dragon Disciple Tribe in the Qinghuan Abyss received it quickly, fled as soon as possible, returned to the Dragon Disciple Tribe's headquarters on this side, and used the formation to protect themselves.

After all, Ye Tiandu was in trouble, where did they dare to fight against the emperors of the Golden God Sect, it was too dangerous!

And for the first time, the dragon shadow of the dragon disciple tribe and several other ancient demon-level existences all knew about the situation here.

They spied a little, and naturally found Aoi.

"Who's that?"

Dragon Shadow didn't even know this emperor-level existence.

However, Long Chen knew that he had been walking outside the territory of the Golden God Department before, and he knew something about the Water Yang Ministry.

And Aoi's reputation is huge, and he has also heard of it.

"It's Aoi of the Water Ripple Division, and its strength is even more terrifying than that of the Aoi!" Long Chen introduced, "In the entire Emperor List of the Abyss of Aromu, Aoi is ranked thirty-sixth, while Aoi is only ranked more than a hundred. You must know that many of the emperor levels on this emperor list are occupied by the main department of the mother of Aluo, if the emperor level of the main department of the mother of Luo is excluded, Aoi's strength can be ranked in the top five!"

Upon hearing this, several other Ancient Demon-level existences were extremely shocked.

If this is really the case, Ye Tian is afraid that it will be dangerous.

And at this moment, Aoi's multiple water demon forms were brought into full play, and the dense clone forms besieged Ye Tian, making Ye Tian's injuries continue to worsen.

Immediately, he began to use the Dapeng technique to try to escape.

But at this time, many of Aoi's form clones performed a special gesture, directly turning into a water cover, intercepting Ye Tian's Dapeng technique.

Rumble!!!!!

The Dapeng technique slammed into the water cover and did not break.

But Ye Tian's mind moved, and the power of the prototype of the Ultimate Rule Realm was fully blessed, and then he used the Dapeng Technique, and finally penetrated the water cover with one blow and successfully escaped.

Thundered!!!

Aoi's dense attack bombarded and injured Ye Tian again, but in the end, Ye Tian escaped.

On the other side, Wei had long been hidden in the dark, and when he saw this, he came directly and wanted to intercept Ye Tian, but he was severely injured by Ye Tian's Arrow Mother's blade.

After all, no matter how injured he is, his strength is still stronger than before, and Wei is not an opponent, and he doesn't even have the ability to intercept him.

Swish!

The Dapeng Technique, the top ultimate arcane technique, successfully allowed Ye Tian to escape.

Wow!

In an instant, Ye Tian came to the headquarters of the Dragon Disciple Tribe in the Qinghuan Abyss Dragon Disciple Tribe, and then the large array was opened to prevent the Golden God Department from attacking.

Immediately, a group of emperors asked Ye Tian what was wrong.

Ye Tian briefly explained the matter, which also made this group of emperors extremely frightened.

However, Ye Tian did not stay here all the time, and soon left the Qinghuan Abyss from here.

......

"God, you're okay with your injuries, right?"

The Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon asked.

"It's not a big problem, you can recover after a while. Ye Tian said.

"Oh my God, are you still sure to defeat Aoi?"

The Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon asked.

Ye Tian shook his head slightly, "With the current strength, it is difficult to defeat it, the other party has a special secret method, and also has two combat forms, if I also practice this kind of special form secret method, otherwise it is impossible to defeat it." "

"If you are given such a secret method, are you sure that you can practice it?"

The Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon asked.

Ye Tiandao: "I'm not sure, I can only say try it as much as possible." "

"You wait, I'll go consult Master Plotz!"

The Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon has gone to Lord Plotz.

After all, Ye Tian was concerned about whether he could defeat the Golden God Department this time, if he couldn't defeat it, the Dragon Disciple Tribe would have to get out.

Therefore, he naturally hoped that Ye Tian would defeat Aoi.

Even if it's unlikely, give it a try.

......

Prooz is now back here, in retreat.

When the Dragon Shadow arrives, he meets Pleoz.

"Dragon Shadow, have the tide of battle changed when you're here?" asked Proz.

"Yes, Lord Ploz, the Golden God Department has invited Aoi from the Water Wave Tribe, ranked thirty-sixth on the Emperor List, and the sky has been defeated. Dragon Shadow said.

When Pleoz heard that he was ranked 36th on the Emperor List, he was really surprised (aefb).

He knew very well what the thirty-sixth place on the emperor list represented, this list was made by the main department of Aluo's mother, and it was ranked based on the record of a battlefield, although it would miss some emperor-level powerhouses, but it was really demonic to be able to enter the top thirty-six.

"The Golden God Department is shameless enough, and it can't even find foreign help. "

Ploz was a little annoyed.

He has been asleep for countless years, and he does not have many connections, so it is really difficult for him to find foreign help now.

At this time, Long Ying said again: "Tian wants to cultivate a special form of secret method, if he cultivates it, he will have a hope of defeating Aoi of the Water Ripple Division!"

"That special form of the secret method is very difficult to cultivate, how can that little guy have enough time to cultivate!"

Proz shook his head, not thinking that Ye Tian could be able to practice in a short period of time.

"Maybe you can try it, and if that doesn't work, think of something else. Dragon Shadow said.

Proz nodded slightly, "It's okay to let this son try it, you can bring him over." "

"Yes, Lord Plotz!"

The dragon shadow quickly brought Ye Tian over.

Ye Tian saw Proz and said respectfully: "Meet Lord Proz!"

"You little guy want to cultivate that special form secret method?"

Pleoz asked.

"Yes, Lord Plotz!"

Ye Tian said truthfully.

Proz introduced: "That special form secret method is actually researched by those ultimate ancient demons and a few peak ancient demons for endless years, the original intention was to enhance the combat power of the ancient demon level, but later after improvement, it can allow the emperor level to cultivate, thus increasing the combat power of the emperor level a lot." However, this special form secret method will make the body structure a little abnormal, unless you can create the most suitable form secret method for yourself, so as not to affect your own breakthrough. Like some form secret methods, they will even increase the difficulty of advancing to the ancient demon level by several times or even ten times. There is even the most terrifying form secret method, which increases its strength to an extremely terrifying level, and can fight with the ancient demon level, but it cannot break through to the ancient demon level for life. "

"Lord Plotz, how many of these forms do you have here?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Two kinds!" Pleoz said: "One is the secret method of the demon dragon form, which is created by this seat, and the difficulty of cultivation is okay, but once it is practiced, it will reduce your chance of breakthrough by five times, and it will change your body form." The second is the True Lin form, which I obtained by accident, but after cultivating, it will give you seven times the chance of breaking through, and the True Lin form is very powerful, even more powerful than the Demon Dragon form, but the difficulty of cultivation is also extremely terrifying. "

Ye Tian didn't hesitate at all, and chosen: "Lord Pleoz, I want to cultivate the True Lin Form!"
